right.timingNote: process-level timing includes tint startup overhead

startupCorrected.timingNote: raw tint process-wall samples with the trivial-shader baseline p50 subtracted

comparabilityNote: Doe uses in-process timing; Tint raw timings use process-level timing which includes OS process startup. startupCorrectedDeltaPercent is a derived view that subtracts the trivial-shader baseline p50 from each Tint raw sample; raw timings remain the auditable source metric. When right.warm is present it comes from the in-process Dawn tint_benchmark target on the Tint benchmark corpus.
